intro: When he awoke, he found himself in a slaughterhouse ruled by blood and madness."CRUELTY" is a survival splatter horror film where the only option is to run away.
description:
"CRUELTY" is a Japanese-made splatter horror game.
No one will save you. Only you can save yourself.
"CRUELTY" is a third-person perspective 3D survival horror game.
Instead of engaging in combat with enemies, players must progress through stages by solving puzzles while evading or hiding from threats.
Survival hinges on escaping or concealing oneself. The playtime typically ranges from 30 to 60 minutes.
